audit_items.proof_trace: Prysm's implementation is a thin wrapper delegating to external c-kzg-4844 library (github.com/ethereum/c-kzg-4844/v2). The batch verification algorithm is implemented in the external library, not in Prysm's codebase. Correctness of batch≡individual equivalence is guaranteed by the canonical Ethereum Foundation library and verified via consensus spectests.
